programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Regine and Darryl second-guess their relationship after she fails to hit it off with his friends.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Things heat up for Maxine when she finds out her new boss is her former boyfriend.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Kyle becomes annoyed with Overton and Synclaire's relationship; Maxine tries to recover a compromising tape of herself.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: The R&B group 702 shoots to stardom in the mid 1990s with top-10 hits and platinum album success; the members recall how personnel changes and jealousies led to the group's disbanding in 2003.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Ken is a professional performer with a busy lifestyle. His roommates recently moved out and left him with a two bedroom apartment in need of a major redesign.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Titus and Ami are a busy couple who are always on the go and they have two active children who love to play. The couple says their two bedroom apartment feels more like a storage unit than a home, due to the clutter and lack of space. They need Jake.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Dominique is a barber who lives in Long Beach, but she has an elite clientele in Hollywood. Her love for clothes and lack of space, forced her to turn her bedroom into a closet! Now the clothing clutter has her wondering how she can reclaim her spac.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Lisa and Tyler are high school sweethearts who recently got engaged. They have said goodbye to their respective roommates and moved into their first apartment together. Now, they are living out of boxes and say they need a revamped living-dining roo.

programme.title: Bathroom Makeover
programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.sub-title: Get the Hell Out Before I Delout
programme.desc: Delroy's wildly-successful former-protégé buys out Del Jones Realty; a game night with the gang at the condo goes terribly wrong and turns everyone against each other.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Jasmine gets serious with Terrence but discovers that he's a wanted drug dealer.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.sub-title: You Don't Have to Go Home, But..
programme.desc: Latrell returns a favor to Armando; Bridget finds a ring in Delroy's office and assumes he's planning on proposing.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: The children and Willona try to convince Florida to have some fun.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: J.J. becomes an instant celebrity after winning a local art show.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: When Cliff and Clair are away, Theo's small gathering erupts into a wild party.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff tries to coax the grandfather (Sammy Davis Jr.) of an unwed mother-to-be into providing moral support for the girl.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff and Clair let Rudy stay up as late as she wants when she complains about all the house rules.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.sub-title: The Dead End Kids Meet Dr. Lotus
programme.desc: Theo's troubles with Justine (Michelle Thomas) inspire him to visit a voodoo doctor (Moses Gunn).

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Max finds her purpose in life through hypnosis; Khadijah's ex-boyfriend professes his love.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Synclaire gets even with a lying Marco with the aid of his ex-wife; Max is pregnant.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Max finds out that Kyle is the father of her baby; Synclaire gets her own TV series.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: The housemates must find a diplomatic way to tell Regine her new boyfriend is married.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A community is rocked when a mother, her children, and their neighbor are brutally murdered; as detectives try to uncover who would commit a quadruple homicide, their investigation leads to an undeniable clue.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Police find a nurse and mother bludgeoned to death in her home, and evidence suggests that someone she knew is the killer; when police learn about her involvement with multiple men, they consider an act of jealousy likely.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: The murder of a new mother shocks a quiet community, especially when investigators learn that her estranged U.S. Army sergeant husband has an alibi; investigators find evidence of a love triangle involving a woman who is willing to cross the line.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: Police are stunned when two young men are gunned down in their backyard; investigators find a heartbroken lover and a web of lies concealing the truth.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: In Lubbock, Texas, detectives respond to an early-morning robbery-turned-homicide; they're not sure where to start looking for the killer, then a surveillance video and an anonymous tip lead them to a secret.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Col. Taylor (Glynn Turman) is roasted at the campus military dinner; Dwayne issues a challenge to Whitley.

programme.desc: Spring break is further complicated for Dwayne and Ron by drug dealers who are pursuing them.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: When Cliff and Clair are away, Theo's small gathering erupts into a wild party.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.sub-title: The Dead End Kids Meet Dr. Lotus
programme.desc: Theo's troubles with Justine (Michelle Thomas) inspire him to visit a voodoo doctor (Moses Gunn).

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a mother of five is found murdered in her home, detectives catch a break in the case when a key witness comes forward; putting the killer behind bars proves to be much more difficult than anticipated.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A hopeful New Year's Eve turns into a tragedy when a man is found shot inside his home; is this just a devastating accident involving a neighborhood celebration?; is it possible this man was the target of a calculated attack?

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: An ambitious single mother with a bright future finds love in a man with a troubled past. When he is linked to murder, she stands by him. And as evidence mounts, loyalty turns to liability as she faces a harsh truth: love could cost her everything.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: When a 26 year old woman falls for a handsome 28 year old, she believes she's found a man who will truly love and protect her; but when his protection comes with dire consequences, she'll have to weigh the cost of his security versus her own freedom.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A hopeful New Year's Eve turns into a tragedy when a man is found shot inside his home; is this just a devastating accident involving a neighborhood celebration?; is it possible this man was the target of a calculated attack?

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: An ambitious single mother with a bright future finds love in a man with a troubled past. When he is linked to murder, she stands by him. And as evidence mounts, loyalty turns to liability as she faces a harsh truth: love could cost her everything.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: Blinded by love and addiction, Laura Walton follows Deon Batton down a path of armed robbery and deception; when the law catches up, she realizes the price of devotion can be life-changing.

programme.title: In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: A man searches for his cousin who was kidnapped by her obsessive ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: black-ish
programme.desc: Dre teaches Andre Jr. how to trash-talk a school bully; Diane's fear of the dark leaves Bow struggling with sleep deprivation.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: J.J. comes up with a vocal discovery that he calls the "great white hope.".

programme.desc: Grandpa Evans brings a special guest of his own for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Former NBA stars (Bill Bradley, Dave DeBusschere, Walt Hazzard, Wali Jones), portray doctors who play a basketball game against younger women (Nancy Lieberman-Cline, Teresa Edwards).

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Sondra and Elvin get child-rearing advice from their families.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Theo's girlfriend (Michelle Thomas) catches him kissing another woman.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Clair's 46th-birthday apprehension is alleviated when Cliff's doctor friend (Placido Domingo) serenades her.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Khadijah discovers that borrowing money from Max to keep Flavor in business might ruin their friendship.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Regine's jealousy affects all the roommates when Maxine begins dating her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: After giving Synclaire dating advice, the women follow her to the restaurant and end up causing a scene.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Maxine persuades Kyle to act as her boyfriend when an old flame arrives for dinner.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A truck driver vanishes just months into her marriage, and detectives wonder if she's having second thoughts; crucial evidence points investigators toward a plot spanning multiple states.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A sixteen-year-old boy comes home to find his mother dead in a pool of blood; after learning that she may have had a stalker, police begin searching widely for the mystery man, only to discover that her killer is someone very close to home.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: Brazen armed robberies strike local businesses in a tranquil community in Wisconsin, and detectives find themselves with few clues to help them identify the perpetrators.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A gifted high school cheerleader's plans for a bright future turn dark when she falls in love with an up-and-coming rapper and ex-convict.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A woman who is unlucky in love meets a smooth-talking older man and thinks she has finally found someone with whom to start a life.

programme.desc: Whitley plans to tell Dwayne that a relationship is possible -- but it may be too late.
